scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development RSDOCTOR=false PORT=3003 NODE_OPTIONS="--experimental-vm-modules --experimental-global-webcrypto" node server.js
scripts.test:e2e: RR_E2E_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=false playwright test && corepack pnpm run test:production
scripts.test:production: corepack pnpm run test:production:module && corepack pnpm run test:production:commonjs
scripts.test:production:module: RR_SERVER_OUTPUT=module corepack pnpm run build && node scripts/smoke-production.mjs
scripts.test:production:commonjs: RR_SERVER_OUTPUT=commonjs corepack pnpm run build && node scripts/smoke-production.mjs
